Random thought: Tulu is basically an isekai protagonist
Lived one life with natural incredible power and status.
Is reborn into an alien society
Still is incredibly powerful and unique
Has random followers and a cult that worship him
Miriam is kind of like a dry trophy harem member, although not exactly the same. Close enough, in concept.
I mean, her obsession with Tulu definitely fits. I don't remember her being married to Goliath in any of the dialogue stuff, though?
she's obsessed with some kind of foreign god
Tulu was once the King of Lemuria
||he shares the same power with fake god that she called upon||
I guess I got mixed up by the bilibili wiki page google translate stuff
Goliath try to be there for Murphy after chapter 6
And he used to think Miryam a goddess lol
Miryam reveres Tulu because He is her King and her religion’s messenger
Soem profiles on Bili wiki are oudated
Seems like they drop the King out of her story

||Murphy tho, was adopted by Miryam after she killed her parents, Miryam used her hand to destroyed Murphy's mother womb, pull Murphy out of the womb then later ordered her army to kill Murphy's dad and raised her as like her own-child. Murphy once called Miryam "Mom", but Miryam refused to be called like that. Later she's used Murphy as the vessel of "New God".||
